ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch of wine */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number assigned to the wine */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine batch was produced */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity level of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity level of the wine */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid level of the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar level of the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides level of the wine */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Free sulfur dioxide level of the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Total sulfur dioxide level of the wine */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphates level of the wine */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the wine */,
  "clarity" TEXT /* Clarity of the wine */,
  "aroma" TEXT /* Aroma of the wine */,
  "flavor" TEXT /* Flavor of the wine */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Finish of the wine */,
  "quality_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality level of the wine */,
  "wine_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of wine (e.g., red, white) */,
  "wine_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of wine (e.g., Chardonnay, Merlot) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_wine_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_category_id") REFERENCES wine_categories ("wine_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_wine_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_type_id") REFERENCES wine_types ("wine_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_quality_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_level_id") REFERENCES quality_levels ("quality_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_levels" (
  "quality_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality level (e.g., Poor, Average, Good, Excellent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_types" (
  "wine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of wine */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine type (e.g., red, white) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_categories" (
  "wine_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category of wine */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine category (e.g., Chardonnay, Merlot) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number assigned to the wine */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine batch was produced */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the batch */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the producer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the producer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the producer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the producer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_controls" (
  "quality_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch of wine being checked */,
  "control_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality control check was performed */,
  "control_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_controls_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the batch */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, approve) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being modified */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being modified */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was made */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who made the modification */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
